query:
SELECT 
  roi.id, roi.productId, roi.expectedQuantity, roi.receivedQuantity,
  roi.status, p.sku, p.unitsPerBox,
  pc.factorToBase, pc.unitCode
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
LEFT JOIN productConversions pc ON pc.productId = roi.productId AND pc.tenantId = roi.tenantId
WHERE roi.tenantId = 30001
ORDER BY roi.id;
